name: simple-salat
description: Salat prayer-times app for the Mudita Kompakt — Arc of the Day design

scripts.download-assets: mkdir -p www/vendor www/fonts && curl -fsSL -o www/vendor/react.min.js https://unpkg.com/react@18.3.1/umd/react.production.min.js && curl -fsSL -o www/vendor/react-dom.min.js https://unpkg.com/react-dom@18.3.1/umd/react-dom.production.min.js && curl -fsSL -o www/fonts/lato-400.woff2 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fontsource/lato/files/lato-latin-400-normal.woff2 && curl -fsSL -o www/fonts/lato-700.woff2 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fontsource/lato/files/lato-latin-700-normal.woff2 && curl -fsSL -o www/fonts/amiri-400.woff2 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fontsource/amiri/files/amiri-arabic-400-normal.woff2 && curl -fsSL -o www/fonts/amiri-700.woff2 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fontsource/amiri/files/amiri-arabic-700-normal.woff2
scripts.build: npm run compile-jsx && npm run download-assets
